name: classify_benefit
description: Classify the medical benefit type based on diagnosis, procedures, medications, and other claim details

diagnosis.description: Primary diagnosis or medical condition description

medications.description: List of medications prescribed or administered

hospital_stay_days.description: Number of days the patient stayed in hospital

treatment_location.description: Where treatment was provided (e.g. hospital, clinic, ER)

document_text.description: Raw text from claim documents for keyword-based classification
